column3:
Run the testdrive for deleted_articles to set up the fixtures for this test

http://testdoaj.cottagelabs.com//testdrive/deleted_articles
Log in to the system as an administrator

Go to the admin notifications page

http://testdoaj.cottagelabs.com//admin/notifications

column4: There are no notifications listed for either user account supplied in the testdrive

column3: Go to the testdrive page without reloading it, and click the button marked "Run background task".

column4: The text beneath the button confirms that the script executed successfully

column3: Return to the admin notifications page

column4: A new notification is present with the title "Deleted articles in your journal(s) this week".
The notification content lists the titles and details of the deleted articles.

column3: Verify that if multiple articles were deleted for the same publisher, they are grouped into a single notification.
